summary: The generation pack is executable and now fills the 8-GPU budget with two unpatched controls plus six first-order candidates. Because the executable catalog does not provide six aligned state-conditioned families on one frozen base, the nearest runnable pack spans multiple stage bases while keeping every candidate first-order and catalog-backed.
warnings: This full-8-slot pack mixes executable bases across hm2, stage3_1, stage3_2, stage3_3, stage3_4, and stage3_5 because the catalog lacks six state-conditioned first-order families on one frozen base.
H2 intentionally overrides tokenizer/data env to the stage3_2 SP8192 base, while the controls and most other candidates inherit the cycle's SP1024 defaults.
fixes: If you want strict base-freeze family admission, split this into separate per-base generations instead of one 8-slot mixed-base sweep.
